title: Mockingbird
content: A mock data platform that serves realistic, repeatable payloads through REST and GraphQL APIs for QA, prototypes, and demos.

title: GymRegime
content: A browser-based workout regime creator and tracker with muscle-group mapping, curated exercise recommendations, and JSON import/export.

title: Telehealth System
content: A full telehealth consultation platform for online weight-loss programs connecting patients with licensed providers. Product identity and live demo are censored upon client request.
stack: Ruby on Rails, Next.js, Typescript, TailwindCSS, PostgreSQL, Authorize.Net, AWS

title: Men's Health Telehealth System
content: A men's health telemedicine product for digital intake, consultations, and treatment flow management between patients and clinicians. Product identity and live demo are censored upon client request.
stack: Ruby on Rails, React.js, Redux, PostgreSQL, Bootstrap, Authorize.Net, AWS

title: Denoted
content: A modern note-taking app built with React and Rails, featuring a clean writing interface and structured content workflows.
stack: Ruby on Rails, React.js, TailwindCSS, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Heroku

title: Combo-Fu
content: A MERN app that translates fighting-game notation into visual inputs to make combo guides easier to read and practice.

title: Nadius Solutions
content: Corporate website built for a Dutch software house to showcase services, capabilities, and digital offerings.

title: Recipes a la React
content: A recipe management web app on the MERN stack with GraphQL integration for querying and organizing recipe data.
stack: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js,, Apollo Boost, GraphQL, Heroku

title: React and Redux IM
content: A real-time instant messaging client built with React, Redux Saga, and WebSockets, designed as a frontend-only chat experience.

title: OMDbrowser
content: A React movie discovery app powered by the OMDb API for searching and browsing films and TV series.

title: Veteranlogix
content: Company website delivered for a Pakistan-based software house focused on custom software and digital solutions.

title: Veteran People
content: End-to-end rebrand and website redesign for a digital agency specializing in WordPress development, maintenance, and hosting.

title: Villa
content: Concept website design for a fictional real-estate agency, created as part of a WordPress theme design batch.

title: Hobuddies
content: Brand identity and marketing design work for a speed-networking social platform, including digital campaign assets.
stack: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Xd, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe After Effects

title: clean
content: One-page portfolio website concept for a fictional brand, designed for later adaptation into a WordPress theme.

title: Snapshot
content: Website concept for a fictional photography studio, created as part of a design collection intended for WordPress themes.

title: Craft World
content: Logo identity design for a platform built to spotlight local handicraft artisans in Pakistan.
